author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IToyota Corolla Cross GR-S ilandele ejwayelekile ngokuthuthukiswa yashintshwa indlela ebukeka ngayo ngaphandle nangaphakathi Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IMOTO: TOYOTA COROLLA CROSS GR-S EKUQALENI konyaka odlule kwaToyota South Africa Motors bethule iCorolla Cross ethuthukisiwe kwazise ibisineminyaka ikhona njengoba yaqala ukudayisa ngo-2021. Kusuka yaqala ukudayisa, le moto eyakhiwa efemini yakwa-Toyota eseProspecton, eThekwini, idayisa ubuthaphuthaphu. Empeleni yiyona SUV edayisa kakhulu eNingizimu Afrika njengoba nyakenye kudayiswe angu-22 191. Ngesikhathi ithuthukisiwe nyakenye, iGR-S iqhubeke nokudayisa njengokujwayelekile. Kushintshile lokho kuleli sonto ekomkhulu leToyota Gazoo Racing enkundleni yezimoto zomjaho, iZwartkops Raceway, eGauteng, kwethulwa iCorolla Cross GR-S ethuthukisiwe. Kube yindawo efanele yokusingatha umcimbi kwazise uGR-S umele uGazoo Racing Sport. Le moto yiyona GR-S edayisa kakhulu okuwedlula wonke kwaToyota. Nokho kwiCorolla Cross izinguquko azenzekanga enjinini njengoba kuseqhubeka ebezikhona phambilini. Zehlukene, kukhona ekaphethroli nengunhliziyombili i-hybrid ehlanganise ekaphethroli nekagesi. IToyota Corolla Cross GR-S itholakala ngemibala emithathu ehlukene emzimbeni engafani nokhakhayi olumnyama Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Ekaphethroli injini ingu-1.8 litre enamandla angu-103kW ne-torque engu-172Nm. U-gearbox ungumshini ozishintshayo oyi-CVT. Kwabafuna ukonga eyi-hybrid inamandla ahlanganisiwe angu-90kW ne-torque engu-142kW. Ngo-100km bathi idla amalitha angu-4.3 nokuyinto enhle kulesi sikhathi lapho simelwe wukunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli. Ngiyishayela ePitoli kuleli sonto isuka buthule ize iqale ukuduma uma usunyusa isivinini. Lapho iCorolla Cross eshintshwe khona yindlela ebukeka ngayo, ezinye izinguquko esezivele zikhona kwejwayelekile. Ishintshe amalambu angama-LED ngaphambili kwafakwa nama-indicator akhanya sakudweba. I-grille emnyama nayo ishintshiwe, kanjalo ne-skid plate ezansi. Ezinhlangothini kushintshwe amarimu angu-18 inch nesiketi ngezansi. Ukhakhayi lusemnyama njengaphambilini, alufani nombala womzimba. Imibala okhetha kuyo ngomhlophe, osiliva nobomvu. Ngaphakathi umbala obomvu ufakwe emabhandeni nokuyenza ibukeke i-sporty. Amesha nezitishi ezibomvu ezisesiteringini sesikhumba esimnyama esinophawu lakwa-GR. Okunye okuyenza ibe "sporty" ama-pedal ezansi. IToyota Corolla Cross GR-S ifakwe ama-pedals acwebezelayo ukuyenza ibukeke i-sporty Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Baphinde bashintsha i-centre console ngasegiyeni nokuyinto eyenziwe nakumaCorolla Cross ajwayelekile. Kuningi okunye efika nakho njenge-touchscreen infotainment system engu-10.1 inch lapho uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto futhi iveze nengaphandle ngamakhamera. Ine-digital instrument cluster engu-12.4 inch, unyakazisa unyawo ngaphansi kwebhuthi ukuze ivuleke, izihlalo zesikhumba nokunye. Kwezokuphepha inama-airbag ayisikhombisa, iyasho uma uphuma emzileni nokunye. Mihla namalanga kwethulwa ama-SUV amasha eNingizimu Afrika ngakho bekumele kwaToyota bayithuthukise ukuze bengasaleli ngemuva. Uma uyiqhathanisa neHaval Jolion, Omoda C5, Jetour Dashing, Chery Tiggo 7 Pro iziqengqelezela yodwa phambili ngokudayisa. Yinto efanayo nnakwiCorolla Cross GR-S ebambe u-50% wemakethe uma uyiqhathanisa neVW T-Cross R-Line neHaval Jolion S. Toyota Corolla Cross 1.8 GR-S – R527 000 Toyota Corolla Cross 1.8 HEV GR-S – R569 700 Zifika ne-service plan yamasevisi ayisithupha noma u-90 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emithathu noma u-100 000km. Eyi-hybrid ine-warranty yebhethri yeminyaka eyisishiyagalombili noma u-160 000km.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Izimoto zongqongqoshe SIGXEKWA nxa zonke isinqumo soMnyango kaMgcinimafa, sokunyusa imali yokuthenga izimoto zoNgqongqoshe kanjalo nabaPhathiswa beminyango ezifundazweni. Lokhu kulandela ukunyuswa kwemali yokuthenga izimoto, isuke kuR800 000 yaya kuR1.1 million. Umfelandawonye wezinyunyana zabasebenzi iCOSATU neqembu iBOSA, bagxeka lesi sinyathelo sikaMgcinimafa. UMnuz Matthew Parks weCOSATU, ugxeke lesi sinyathelo wathi sifana nokuthifela emehlweni abantulayo. Uthe umnyango kaMgcinimafa utshela abantu ukuthi babophe izifociya kodwa ngakolunye uhlangothi, uthatha izinqumo ezibudedengu ngemali. "UMgcinimafa uhlale ekhala ngokuthi kunenkinga yemali afune ukunyusa intela efakwa uma uthenga impahla iVAT, kodwa unyusela abantu abavele behola kahle imihlomulo. Unyusa intela ekhokhwa abasebenzi ngenxa yokuthi ufuna ukupepenyekisa kahle osopolitiki." Ukhale ngokuthi ayinyuswa nemali eholwa abantu abangasebenzi kuleli, esami ku-R370 ngenyanga. "Le mali ayinyuki kodwa isiza abahlwempu. Sifuna uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa angenelele ngokuchitha lesi sinyathelo." Uthe akukwazi ukulokhu kukhalwa ngemali ekubeni kuhlonyuliswa osopolitiki kuphela. "Incane imali ekhona ezweni ngakho osopolitiki abafunde ukuphila ngalokhu abanakho. Abahambe ngezimoto zohlobo olufanayo ziphinde zakhiwe kuleli." Uthe uhulumeni unezinto ezibaluleke kakhulu okumele uzenze hhayi ukugxila ezintweni ezingathi shu. "Abakhokhi bentela balindele okungcono kuhulumeni hhayi ukuxhashazwa kwemali. Ayichithwe eyokunyuswa kwemali yezimoto zosopolitiki kanti sifuna ukubakhumbuza ukuthi luyeza ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya maduzane." Umholi weBOSA uDkt Mmusi Maimane, usigxekile isinyathelo sikahulumeni sokunyusa imali yezimoto wathi siveza ukuthi uhulumeni uqhelile kubantu. Uthe lesi sinyathelo sivuna ngisho amaphini ongqongqoshe kanjalo nondunankulu bezifundazwe. "Lesi sinyathelo sizocasula abantu, ikakhulu abangasebenzi nababhuqwa yindlala. Imali yomphakathi kumele yenze izidingo ezibalulekile, hhayi ubukhazikhazi." Uthe bazolokhu beqhubekile nokuphenya ibheshu njengoba uNgqongqoshe wezeziMali, uMnuz Enoch Godongwana, edalule eyokunyuka kwemali empendulweni yombuzo obubuzwe yileli qembu ePhalamende.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ S'bu Mpisane eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, izolo Image: Doctor Ngcobo/Independent Media ASIBANGE sisalalelwa izolo, eNkantolo eNkulu yaseThekwini, isicelo sombango wamafa ophakathi kowayeyiphoyisa likaMasipala weTheku, uMnuz S'bu Mpisane nowayengunkosikazi wakhe, uNksz Shauwn Mkhize. Bekulindeleke ukuthi inkantolo ilalele isicelo sombango wamafa kulandela isehlukaniso somshado esakhishwa yinkantolo ngoNovemba 2024. Nokho kwagcina kungafinyelelwanga ekutheni bazohlukaniselana kanjani amafa. UMpisane ufuna kubuyekezwe izinto ezimbalwa mayelana nokwahlukaniselana kwamafa njengoba babeshade umshado owahlanganisayo. UMpisane obeswenke ngesudi emnyama enemikhono emfishane, ubonakale efika enkantolo ngethemba lokuthi udaba lwakhe luzolalelwa. Nokho ubonakale eqhwetshwa ebizelwa ngaphandle ngabameli bakhe, ukuyongqumuza okuthile, okuthe emva kwesikhathi babonakala bephuma behamba. Ubebukela ezikhululekele ebusweni, engakhombisi kudinwa noma kuphatheka kabi. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi abameli bakhe belulekwe ngokuthi bambhalele incwadi uNksz Mkhize, emphoqa ukuba abekhona enkantolo uma sekulalelwa isicelo sikaMpisane. Ngaleso sizathu icala lagcina lingahlalanga, kwangacaca nokuthi lizophinde lihlale nini. Ngokwamaphepha asenkantolo, uMpisane ufuna kubuyekelwe isigaba sesibili sencwadi yesehlukaniso, ukuze kwengezwe ezinye izinto, eveza eyombango oqhubekayo wempahla abayithola ngesikhathi beshade umshado ohlanganisa amafa. Umshado walaba ababili wabhidlika emva kweminyaka eyevile ku-20 beshadile. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, uNksz Mkhize ujahwa abe-South African Revenue Service (SARS) ngesikweletu sentela ebalelwa phakathi kuka-R37 million kuya ku-R40 million.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Izovula ngoJulius Mkhwanazi ikhomishini kaMadlanga IKhomishini kaMadlanga kulindeleke ukuthi iqhubeke nomsebenzi wayo ngoLwesibili ngemuva kwekhefu lePhasika elifushane njengoba kulindeleke ukuthi iPhini leNhloko yamaPhoyisa kaMasipala waseKurhuleni (EMPD) uJulius Mkhwanazi abuye azokwethula ubufakazi. UJeremy Michaels, okhulumela iKhomishini uthe ofakazi abangu-49 sebethule ubufakazi ezinsukwini ezingu-84. UMichaels phambilini umemezele ukuthi ikhomishini izothatha ikhefu lePhasika ngoLwesithathu, 25 Mashi, 2026, iqale ukusebenza ngoLwesibili, 07 Ephreli 2026. Uthe uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa welule isikhathi seKhomishini ukuze ikwazi kuqhubeka nohlu olude lofakazi abasazokwethula ubufakazi ngaphansi kwesifungo. IKhomishini kusamele imemezele ufakazi olandelayo. Ngosuku lokugcina ngaphambi kwekhefu (ngoMashi 24, 2026), iPhini leNhloko yamaPhoyisa oPhiko Lwezokuvikelwa Kwempahla kanye Nezokuphepha eMnyangweni Wamaphoyisa kaMasipala weDolobha laseTshwane (TMPD), uRevo Spies, wethula ubufakazi ngamaqembu obugebengu angenisile komasipala. Uchaze kabanzi ngohlelo lwethenda olungekho emthethweni lokuqapha izakhiwo zikamasipala, olubandakanya iGubis 85 Solutions, okuyinkampani yonogada eyathinteka ebufakazini bephoyisa ezingaphansi kophiko lwe-Gauteng Organised Crime Unit uSergeant Fannie Nkosi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KUMINZE isangoma ebesiyogeza abantu emfuleni waseNanda, enyakatho yeTheku KUMINZE isangoma, okuthiwa besiyohlambulula abantu edamini laseNanda, endaweni yaseSikebheni, eMzinyathi, ngoMsombuluko. Ngokusho komthombo, umufi ongowesifazane, ubehamba nabanye abantu abambalwa beyogezwa. “Uminze engakabagezi. Bekusewuye kuphela obesangene emanzini,” kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi isigameko senzeke kusakhanya, nokho umufi abakwazanga ukumhlenga ebebekhona. “Asazi ukuthi bebesukaphi, kodwa akubona abendawo,” kusho umthombo. Ikhansela lendawo, uMnuz Falakhe Gcabashe, lithintwa yiSolezwe, lithe lisanda kuzwa ngodaba, lathi alikakabi nolwazi olugcwele. “Engikutholile wukuthi umufi nalabo abehamba nabo ababona abantu bendawo. Asikabi nalo ulwazi lokuthi bebesuka kuphi nendawo. Okusho ukuthi bebezokwenza lokho ebebezokwenza bese behamba,” kusho uGcabashe. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aseNanda avule idokodo lokufa komuntu ukuze liphenywe kulandela ukuminza komuntu edamini laseNanda ngoMsombuluko. “Kusolwa ukuthi owesifazane ubegeza abantu edamini eliseSikebheni ngesikhathi eminza,” kusho uSgt Ngcobo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: USWAZI Simelane oseveze ukuthi uphelile umshado wakhe noVJ Xaba  njengoba bebebonakala ohlelweni, i-Being A Xaba kuMzansi Magic njalo ngeSonto BAMNCOMILE ngesinqumo sokuqeda ngomshado wakhe noJabulani Xaba, odume ngelikaVJ,  uSwazi Simelane, obengomunye wabebevela ohlelweni i-Being A Xaba, obelukhonjiswa njalo ngeSonto ngo-7 ebusuku, kuMzansi Magic. Kulolu hlelo olufinyelele emaphethelweni ngeSonto, unkosikazi kaVJ, uSwazi, ubhale enkundleni iTikTok ukuthi ukuba kulolu hlelo kube uhambo alujabulele, futhi wabonga ababukeli balo ngokubamukela emindenini yabo. "Siyabonga kakhulu bantu bakithi ngokusibukela, kube uhambo obelwehla lwenyukela kodwa siyabonga mina nezingane zami," kubhala uSwazi. Omunye wabalandeli bakhe, ube esemncoma ngokwenzeke esiqeshini sokugcina lapho abekhuluma khona nomyeni ethi akalalele izingane zakhe uma zikhuluma naye. Kodwa kuleyo nkulumo uSwazi uveze izindaba ezishaqisayo zokuthi useshiyile ekubeni umakoti kulo mndeni. "Ngiyabonga kakhulu sithandwa sami, angiseyona ingxenye yaKwaXaba uhambo lwami noNonkosi selufike ekugcineni," kusho uSwazi. Abanye bamncomile uSwazi besho ukuthi ngesinqumo asithathile uzibeke yena phambili. ULondiwe Shangase uthe:"Kodwa ngabe ngingumuntu omubi ngokungamjabuleli ngesinqumo asithathile". UBucie uthe:"Ayikho into enhle njengokubona umuntu wesifazane ezikhetha yena, zikhethe wena njalo sisi siyakuthanda kukukhanyele mama". UNozipho Zeeh uthe:"Sisi ufikile, sakubona kodwa le ibingengangawe. Ngiyajabula ukubona ukuthi uzikhethe wena, ufanelwe okungcono wena nezingane zakho, nazo zidinga umama onothando nonokuthula ngoba ngeke Sisi yoooooh". Ababukeli balolu hlelo bake baveza seluphakathi, ukuthi iyadumaza indlela uXaba anesandla esiqinile ngayo ezinganeni, nakuye umkakhe ngezinye izikhathi. Baveza imizwa yokuthi akabalaleli abanye abantu, ufuna kuzwiwe ngaye. Ngenxa yesasasa yalolu hlelo iziqephu zalo kwakumele ziphele uma sekukhonjiswe ezingu-13 kuphela kodwa zanyuswa ngenxa yokuthandwa kohlelo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IZIKHULU zikaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi noMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, abavele enkantolo izolo Image:  Itumeleng English/ Independent Newspapers AMAPHOYISA aveze ukuthi izikhulu zikaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi noMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, baboshelwe ukuthi baqasha umuntu owaya kozenza uLerutla enkantolo. ULerutla oyimenenja yomkhandlu, kuthiwa waqasha umuntu ukuthi ayozenza yena enkantolo lapho ayebhekene khona necala lokushayela budedengu. Icala lagcina limlahla uLerutla, wagwetshwa ukuba ayokwenza umsebenzi womphakathini. Kuthiwa lo muntu owayeqashiwe waphinda wazenza uLerutla, waya kokwenza umsebenzi womphakathi okwakufanele wenziwe uLerutla. Lokhu kuvezwe okhulumela amaphoyisa kuzwelonke, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe. UBrigadier Mathe uthe lo muntu owayeqashiwe wakhokhelwa imali ayihlukaniselana noMkhwanazi. UBrigadier Mathe akazange afune ukusho ukuthi ngabe uzoboshwa yini lo muntu owayeqashwe uLerutla. UMkhwanazi noLerutla bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg, lapho bebebhekene khona necala lenkohlakalo nelokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uLwesine. UMkhwanazi watholwa nezinhlamvu zesibhamu ngesikhathi eboshwa. UMkhwanazi usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala. Khonamanjalo: Iphoyisa elisolwa ngokusondelana noMatlala, uSergeant Fannie Nkosi, liqhubekile nokufaka isicelo sebheyili, izolo. UNkosi uboshelwe icala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho nokuphula imigomo yokugcinwa kwezibhamu. Isinqumo esicelweni sakhe sebheyili sizokhishwa kusasa.Naye uMatlala uvele kafushane enkantolo izolo, lapho kunqunywe khona ukuthi asuswe ejele eliKwaZulu-Natal, iBongweni, ayogcinwa eKgosi Mampuru.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKING David Muvhengo ongomunye wabadidiyeli bomdlalo Uzalo, useveze ukuthi uthando olulokhu lukhonjiswe ababukeli balo mdlalo, abaqala kudala ukuwulandela, yilona olubagqugquzela ukuthi benze umsebenzi oncomekayo. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi lo mdlalo umemezela abalingisi abasha, abazoba yingxenye yawo kusuka kule nyanga. Kubalingisi abakhona kubalwa asebezakhele igama ekulingiseni okukhona kubo uThulani Mtsweni ozolingisa indawo kaPondo, Nduduzo Zuma (Smiso), Phindile Mashabane (LaDlamini) noSikhosiphi Ngcobo (Bab’Sizwe). UMukwevho uthe laba balingisi bazofike bangene khaxa kuzona zonke izindaba ezenzeka KwaMashu, kule sizini yesibili esanda kuqala. "Bazofika benze lo mdlalo uye phambili, ezintweni ezenzekayo kuwona manje. Kule sizini esanda kuqala ababukeli bangalindela izinto ezizobashiya bebambe ongezansi kodwa ezizokwenza ukuthi abantu abaningi baqhubeke nokuwujabulela  futhi bahlale beseduzane nawo," kusho uMukwevho. Uthe bayaqhubeka nokumema bonke abalandeli bawo abasuka kude nawo, ukuthi baqhubeke nokuwuthakasela njengoba kuyibona abababeke lapho bekhona. "Siyathembisa ukuthi ngeke size sibaphoxe, uthando, uxhaso ababukeli abasikhombise lona lwenza siqhubeke nokwenza lo mdlalo njengoba manje sikwisizini ka-12, esizibophezele ukuthi siqhubeke silethe lokhu abakufunayo, nokuzobajabulisa," kusho yena. U-Ofentse Thinane, obhekelele izinhlelo zakuleli kwiSABC, uthe babemukela ngemfudumalo abalingisi abasha kulo mdlalo, wathi abakubhekile abazokuletha ezindaweni abazilingisayo nobudlelwane abazoba nabo nozakwabo. UNduduzo Zuma, uqale ukubonakala kulo mdlalo ngenyanga edlule, uPhindile Mashabane yena uqale ukubonakala ngoLwesithathu, uSikhosiphi Ngcobo uzoqala ukubonakala namhlanje kuthi uThulani Mtsweni aqale ukubonakala ngo-Ephreli 24.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Abalimi bakamoba nabasebenzi abebefuna izincazelo izolo ngekusasa labo kanjalo nelemisebenzi yabanye babasebenzi njengoba bethi kunzima ukusebenza muva nje nemiholo yabo seyehlile ngenxa yokungathengwa komoba wabo ABALIMI bakamoba sebephumele obala bathi bafuna ukwazi ngekusasa labo enkampanini kashukela, iTongaat Hullets. Lokhu bakusho izolo njengoba bebenesiteleka ngaphandle kwamasango ale nkampani, nabanye babasebenzi abaqashwe abasebenza ezimobeni. Bathe manje sesifikile isikhathi sokuthi batshelwe ngekusasa labo njengoba konke kumile, kungekho inqubekela phambili ngokuthengwa kwemikhiqizo yabo, okwenza bangakhiphi isivuno sikamoba, futhi kungangeni mali nabasebenzi bangaholi. Omunye wabatshali bakamoba uMnuz Derrick Mkhize, othe uqashe abantu abangu-70 enkampanini yakhe, uthe okubuhlungu wukuthi selokhu kwavela izindaba zokuthi inkampani kashukela kungenzeka ivalwe, abasebenzi bakhe sekuyizinyanga ezimbili bengatholi amaholo aphelele njengoba ingekho imali engenayo. “Lesi simo asithinti thina kuphela singabalimi bakamoba, kodwa miningi imindeni ethintekayo ngaso njengoba ithembele kithina kodwa nathi lokhu okwenzekayo sekungaphezu kwamandla ethu. Abasebenzi asazi ngempela ukuthi yini esizobatshela yona ngalesi simo ngoba nathi akukho okubambekayo esikuzwayo. South Africa. Member of Parliament Letsike Mmapaseka Steve Emily Credit:PARLIAME IPHINI likaNgqongqoshe wabeSifazane nabantu abaPhila nokuKhubazeka uMmapaseka Steve Letsike, osephumele obala wathi kumele bakulwele ukuthi ingavalwa inkampani kashukela, iTongaat Hullets njengoba iqashe abesifazane netsha eningi Uthe “Uma inkampani ivala, konke esikusebenzele kanzima kuzofa kuphele nya, ngoba iTongaat Hullets iyithemba lethu. Siyacela ukuthi kube bahlangane nathi ukuze kuxoxwe ngento eya phambili, kuvikelele nokuthi isimo somnotho singabi sibi kakhulu kunalokhu esiyikho manje." Amalungu omphakathi abekhona kule mashi anxuse uhulumeni, abaholi emphakathini nasezinkampanini ezehlukene ezithintekauyo ukuthi bangenelele ukuze kuvikeleke imisebenzi yabo. IPhini likaNgqongqoshe waBesifazane nabantu abaPhila nokuKhubazeka uMmapaseka Steve Letsike, uphawulile ngalolu daba emsakazweni Igagasi FM, lapho eveze  khona ukuthi uhulumeni lumkhathaze kakhulu lolu daba njengoba inkampani yakwaHullets inkulu. Uthe osomabhizinisi ikakhulukazi abancane yibona abebehlomula kakhulu kule nkampani, wathi kumele bakulwele ukuthi ingavalwa, iqhubeke nokuvula amathuba omsebenzi. "Asikwazi ukuthi kube khona imisebenzi ephelayo kuleli, kukhona abantu besifazane abaningi abasebenza kule nkampani kanjalo nentsha. UMnyango obhekelele imisebenzi uphezu kwalo lolu daba, yingakho nathi siyilo Mnyango singeke sithule." Inkampani kashukela ayiphawulanga.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imoto ebihamba abasolwa abahlanu Kubulawe umsolwa oyedwa, kwaboshwa abane ngemuva kokudubulana namaphoyisa e-Athlone. Leli qulu, okusolwa ukuthi liyamataniswa nesigameko sokugetshengwa kwebhizinisi eLansdowne, belihamba ngeToyota Avanza empunga engenazo izinombolo ngesikhathi amaphoyisa ophiko lwe-Flying Squad ezama ukubavimba. Kubikwa ukuthi umshayeli uzame ukubalekela amaphoyisa nokwenze amaphoyisa avulela ngenhlamvu. Imoto igcine ima. Bebebahlanu abasolwa abebengaphakathi, omunye wabo kwatholakala ukuthi ushonile, omunye obelinele uphuthunyiswe esibhedlela iGroote Schuur, abasolwa abasele baboshwa. Uphiko lwe-Independent Police Investigative Directorate luyaphenya ngokwenzekile.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABANYE babelaphi bendabuko ebebeyingxenye yosuku lokuvulwa kwekhemisi eHluhluwe iMfolozi Park KUHLOSWE ukuthi kulungiswe inkinga yokuvunwa kwezihlahla ngokwedlulele kanjalo nokuzingelwa kwezilwane okungekho emthethweni, ngekhemisi labelaphi bendabuko elivulwe yinhlangano yokongiwa kwemvelo esiqiwini iHluhluwe iMfolozi Park (HiP) ngoMgqibelo. Lokhu kushiwe uMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMnotho, ezokuVakasha nezeMvelo KwaZulu-Natal, uMfundisi Musa Zondi, obeyingxenye yalo mcimbi. Kuthiwa bonke abelaphi bendabuko abasemthethweni, sebezothenga izihlahla kanjalo nokunye okufana namathambo, amafutha, izikhumba zezilwane ezithile nokunye kuleli khemisi elethiwe ngokuthi iseMpilweni Warehouse. UZondi uthe ukukhula kokuvunwa kwezihlahla nokuzingelwa kwezilwane okungekho emthethweni, okuholele ekutheni basibone isidingo sokuvula indawo efuze le, ezodayisa lezi zinto ngokusemthethweni. “Ukuvunwa kwazo okungekho emthethweni nokudayiswa kwazo emakethe engavumelekile, kuyingozi kwimvelo kanjalo nakulezo zitshalo nezilwane ezisengcupheni yokushabalala,” kusho uZondi. Uthe ukwakhiwa kwaleli khemisi akwenziwanga njengoba kulula kodwa kwenziwe ngoba kubonakala isidingo. “Besibhekene nenkinga enkulu yokudayiswa nokuthengwa obekungalawuleki, ukuvuna okwedlulele ezindaweni ezivikelekile yize kunezimvume,” usho kanje. Udalule ukuthi lokhu bekugcina kuholela ekutheni kulahleke imali emakethe engakahleleki. Uthe konke okuzodayiswa kule ndawo kuzobe kuqinisekisiwe, kulandeleka futhi kuyamene nemithetho ehambisana nokongiwa kwemvelo. Uveze ukuthi kubalulekile ukuthi kuqhakambiswe ukuthi le ndawo yenzelwe ukweseka ababelaphi bendabuko. Ubalule nokuthi lokhu kuzobuyisa kabusha isithunzi kwezokwelapha, ubuqotho kanjalo nokusimamisa kezokwelapha ngendabuko. UZondi uthe imali ezophuma ekudayisweni kwalezi zinto, izophinde itshalwe ukuphindaphinda okufanayo. Uthe ikhemisi lenzeke layimpumelelo ngokubambisana kwezeMvelo KZN Wildlife, SAPPI, Provincial People and Parks, kanjalo neNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, wathi kulindeleke ukuthi le ndawo iqale ukusebenza ngokugcwele emva kwezinsuku eziyisikhombisa. Uveze nokuthi bahlela ukuthi eminyakeni emihlanu ezayo, kube sekukhona amakhemisi afana naleli nakwezinye izingxenye zesifundazwe.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IMINI Cooper JCW ibukeka i-sporty futhi iyawadonsa amehlo Image: FANELESIBONGE BENGU IMOTO: MINI COOPER JCW UKWANDA kwamaSport Utility Vehicle (SUV) emakethe emhlabeni jikelele kugcina kwenze zingasheshi ukufika kuqala emqondweni izimoto ezifana neMINI Cooper. Nokho uma isiphambi kwakho kwakheka uthando ngayo emehlweni akho. IMINI Cooper yimoto enomlando omude nedumile njengoba ike yavela ngisho emafilimini. Ebengihamba ngayo yiMINI Cooper John Cooper Works (JWC). Igama uma selijobelelwe ngalolu hlobo kusho ukuthi ishuniwe futhi namandla athe xaxa. Nebala uma uyibuka ngaphandle inemihlobiso yombala obomvu kwibhonethi omesha kamnandi nokhakhayi lwayo namakhava ezibuko. Ngaphambili inamalambu angama-LED okungama-headlights nama-headlights. Kwi-grille iqoshiwe uJohn Cooper Works ukuze ungadideki nakancane. Lo mbala obomvu womhlobiso uyavela futhi nakuma-brake callipers alunguza emarimini angu-18 inch nokuyenza ibukeke kahle Ngemuva ine-spoiler esikhulu esigqamisa ukuba sporty kwayo, amalambu angama-LED i-diffuser ngezansi nenqawe eyodwa phakathi nendawo. Ngaphandle yinhle, nginconywe omunye udade ethi ngihamba ngemoto “e-cute”. Ngaphakathi nakhona bayenze yabukeka kahle ngoba akukho mabhathini ayinqwaba. Cishe konke ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system eyindilinga enkulu phakathi nendawo. Amazinga okushisa uwahlela khona futhi kusobala, iveza inkombandlela, ingaphandle uma upaka, uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay, isivinini ohamba ngaso, uphethroli onawo, nokunye. IMINI Cooper JCW ayinaluxhaxha lwamabhathini ngaphakathi okuningi ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system eyindilinga Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Izinkinobho ezikhona ngezokunyusa umsindo, eyokushintsha ama-drive modes okanye ama-experience njengoba bekubiza kanjalo kwaMINI, eyokuyidumisa neyegiya. Amanye amabhathini asesiteringini esiqumbe kamnandi uma usibambile. Phezu kwaso akukho instrument cluster kunalokho kune-heads up display okwazi ukuyivala uma uthanda. Iveza imininingwane ebalulekile njengejubane. Ngikuthandile ukuthi ngisho inkombandlela uyivula kwiselula nge-Apple CarPlay iyakutshengisa ukuthi kumele ujike kuphi. Umgibeli nomshayeli bahlala ngokukhululeka ezihlalweni zesikhumba okwazi ukuzifudumeza. Bengingakulindele ukuthi esomshayeli siyakuwotawota. Inendawo yokubeka iziphuzo, ukushaja iselula ngaphandle kwentambo, indawo yokuphumuza ingalo bese kuthi okhakhayini ibe ne-sunroof. Ngemuva nokho isihlalo sincane. Ngemuva kwesihlalo sami ngishayela akekho obengakwazi ukungena ahlale. Nesebhuthi sincane iyakhombisa ukuthi ngeyomuntu ongenamndeni. Kulezi zinsukwana engizichithe nayo ngiyizwe ihamba kahle emgwaqeni. Noma ikhasa phansi ibingazweli kakhulu emigwaqeni ngaphandle uma umgwaqo umubi ngempela. Ukushintsha i-drive mode uyifake kuJohn Cooper Works bekuyilapho wonke amandla ayo ebivele iwakhiphe kalula khona. Amandla lawa angu-170kW ne-torque engu-380Nm enjinini engu-2.0 litre turbo kaphethroli. U-gearbox uyi-7 speed dct. Kule drive mode kuqina isiteringi ne-suspension umgwaqo uwuzwe ubunjalo bawo. Noma unyathela isivinini sinyuka manje kwazise phela ukusuka ku-0 iye ku-100km/h kuyithatha imizuzwana engu-6.1 kanti ijubane ligcina ku-250km/h. Bengithi uma ngishintsha igiya nginyukela kwelesibili ngizwe kukhala ithayi langaphambili izama ukunamathela bese iyanamathela etiyeleni. Nasemakhoneni ibijika kalula ngejubane. Nomculo obukhala ezipikheni zeHarman Kardon ngike ngathi ukuwukhohlwa sengizwa ukuduma kwayo okumnandi. Nokho kugcina ngaphakathi kuphela ngoba ngathi kwengezwe ngazo izipikha ngoba ngaphandle akukho nhlobo. Kuphethroli ibingakhalisi indlela ebidla ngayo ngoba ihambe iphuza 7.6l/100km. Ngokwamandla ayo ungayibheka njengembangi ye-VW Golf 8.5 GTI yize intengo iyibeka kwiGolf 1.4. MINI Cooper 3-door hatch JCW – R745 574 Iphuma ne-maintenance plan yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-100 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-LADYSMITH Black Mambazo ivalelisa ngomculo elungwini layo ebese lithathe umhlalaphansi, u-Albert Mazibuko Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IBISIYIBONA indlela yayo ingwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko, edlule emhlabeni ngeSonto eledule, emuva kokugula njengoba igcizelele kumfowabo isesibhedlela ukuthi ifuna ukufihlwa kuphi ngaphambi kokuthi kuyenele ngakusasa. UMazibuko (77) ushonele esibhedlela esiseThekwini, emuva kokugula isikhashana. Umfowabo u-Abednigo Mazibuko, oke wacula kwiMambazo ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi, uthe uMazibuko wazisholo yena ukuthi ufuna ukufihlwa kubo eNtabamhlophe, Estcourt. “Ubengaqali, wakusho futhi kudala ukuthi uma ehamba ufuna ukuya ekhaya. Nakulokhu esegula ngiyombona esibhedlela kuwuMgqibelo, kanti uzohamba ngeSonto, washo wathi ningibeke eceleni kukamfowethu. Niyabona ngapha eduze kwesango. Ngadumala ngoba mina nginethemba lokuthi lo muntu uzophila, wase ekhuluma amagama anzima asinda kangaka. Wathi ningibeke ekhaya impela, ngifuna ukuya ekhaya eduze kukamfowethu. Usethuse kanti usekhuluma okokugcina,” kusho u-Abednigo. U-Abednigo ubekhuluma esithangamini nabezindaba eClermont, izolo, emzini womsunguli weMambazo ongasekho, uJoseph Shabalala. Uthe umfowabo ugule isikhathi esincane kodwa kwamqinisa waze wahlinzwa. Umchaze njengomuntu obenenhlonipho, ehlonipha wonke umuntu kungakhathalele ukuthi mncane noma mdala. Uthe balahlekelwe yisibani ebesegcine nomlando womndeni. Uphethe ngokubonga ukwesekwa wathi bathola izingcingo nemiyalezo evela ngisho phesheya kwezilwandle. URussel Mthembu oyilungu leMambazo eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uthe uMazibuko wayehlale ebagqugquzela ukuthi basebenze kanzima. “Wayethi sisalima, mhla saphumelela umhlabathi uzophenduka igolide, kwenzeka njengoba esho.” ILadysmith Black Mambazo ibuye ngeSonto, eNingizimu Afrika, emuva kokuphothula umjikelezo wase-United States of America (USA). Omunye wabaholi bayo uSibongiseni Shabalala, uthe ngesikhathi bethola izindaba zokudlula kukaMazibuko, babeyohlola imishini yokucula ngaphambi kwekhonsathi yabo kwaba nzima nokuqhubeka. “Kwase kusele imicimbi emine kuya kwemihlanu ukuthi siqede, sibuye. Saqhubeka sayenza sesiyibhekise kuye uMazibuko ngoba sazi ukuthi ukuba ubekhona, ubezosigqugquzela ukuthi asiqhubeke siyibambe kuyona le ndlela abeyihamba.” Uthe uMazibuko, owajoyina iMambazo ngo-1969 nobesethathe umhlalaphansi, ubesadlala indima eqenjini uma lizilolonga aphinde alikhumbuze lapho eliduka khona. “Sifunde okukhulu thina kubaba uMazibuko kusuka sijoyina ngo-1993. Ukuzimisela, ukugcina isikhathi nokuthanda umsebenzi safunda futhi sesiphakathi eMambazweni, nokubambisana nokulalelana ukuthi yikhona okwenza iphupho liphumelele,” kusho uSibongiseni. USibongiseni uveze ukuthi bacele ukulindwa babuye phesheya ukuze bezovalelisa ngaphambi komngcwabo. UMazibuko uzokhonjulwa enkonzweni ezoba seCFCI eBerea, eThekwini ngo-10 ekuseni kusasa. Inkonzo yomngcwabo izoba sesikoleni iMtshezi High, Estcourt ngoMgqibelo ekuseni.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IPHOYISA eliwuSayitsheni elisamisiwe uSergeant Fannie Nkosi Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers LISAZOKUBA ukudla kwejele iphoyisa elisolwa ngokuba ubhululu wemigulukudu, uSergeant Fannie Nkosi, njengoba kuchithwe isicelo salo sebheyili. INkantolo yeMantshi i-Pretoria North ichithe isicelo sebheyili sikaNkosi izolo. UNkosi uboshelwe amacala okwephula imigomo yokugcinwa kwezibhamu, ukutholakala nesiqhumane nezinhlamvu nelokutholakala namadokodo amacala asavalwa. Imantshi uThandi Theledi ithe uNkosi uhlulekile ukuveza izizathu zokuthi kungani kufanele adedelwe ngebheyili. UMbuso ubungafuni ukuthi uNkosi anikwe ibheyili usabela ukuthi angase abalekele icala, njengoba ububeke nokuthi ubona uNkosi ephephile uma esejele ukunokuba anikwe ibheyili ngenxa yokuthi uzwana nemigulukudu engase ifune ukumenzakalisa uma enikwa ibheyili. Ubusabela nokuthi ubengazama ukuphazamisa uphenyo ngenxa yokuthi uyiphoyisa. UNkosi uzogcinwa ejele njengoba amaphoyisa eqhubeka nophenyo lwawo. Usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi ababhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusimuzi "Cat" Matlala noKatiso "KT" Molefe. Ngesikhathi efakaza phambi kweKhomishini eholwa yiJaji Mbuyiseli Madlanga, kwavela ukuthi uNkosi kukhona imali ayeyithola kulabo somabhizinisi abasobishini. Kuphinde kuvele ukuthi wayesondelene nosomatekisi owayesatshiswa okwenyoka, uMnuz Jotham "Mswazi" Msibi nePhini likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa elimisiwe, uLieutenant General Shadrack Sibiya. UNkosi waboshwa emva kokugasela kwamaphoyisa emzini wakhe kulandela ukuvela kwakhe phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga. UNkosi usamisiwe emsebenzini njengoba ebhekene nenqwaba yezinsolo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMOSHE Ndiki izolo oqale ukwethula uhlelo oluthi, Suxoka kuMzansi Magic UBONGA uNkulunkulu ngokuqhubeka emvulela amathuba emkhakheni wokwethula izinhlelo uMoshe Ndiki, emuva kokuba isiteshi iMzansi Magic, simemezele ukubuya kohlelo oluthi Suxoka, ngo-7 ebusuku. Lolu hlelo isizini yalo yesine eze nezinguquko, ibiyethulwa uMotlatsi Mafatshe kuphela kodwa kule sizini kuzoba nabethuli ababili. UMoshe kumanje ungumethuli wohlelo olusha oluthi Mgidi Moms, olungena ngeSonto ngo-6 ntambama, nalo lusanda kuqala kulesi siteshi. Le nsizwa yase-Eastern Cape, iveze ukuthi iyakholelwa ekutheni abantu kumele bangamdeli uNkulunkulu njengoba nayo ikholelwa ekutheni konke okuhle okwenzeka empilweni yayo, kungexa Yakhe. "Angazi nokuthi ngithini ngokuthola ithuba elifana naleli futhi ngisanda kubonakala kolunye uhlelo. Kusho lukhulu kimi ukuba yingxenye yalolu hlelo njengoba sizophenya amahlazo abantu abawenzayo becabanga ukuthi akukho okuzohlala obala ngelinye ilanga. Ngakho olunye uhlelo lolu oluzosiza abantu bakuleli ezinkingeni abafuna ukuxazululelwa zona, engicabanga ukuthi abantu bazoluthakasela kakhulu," kusho uMoshe. Uthe okunye akubhekile wukusebenza kahle noMotlatsi, asemaze iminyaka eminingi kule ndima abakuyo, nabazobambisana ukuletha lokhu ababukeli abakulindele kubona. UMoshe echaza ngokuba sohlelweni olugqamisa isiko lakwaXhosa lokusoka, uveze ukuthi ukuba nalolu hlelo, kugcizelela ukuthi izinhlelo ezigxile emasikweni kumele zisukunyelwe zenziwe, ukuze amasiko angafi. "Luvele lwangikhumbuza kwamina ohambweni lwami ngesikhathi ngenzelwa leli siko, ngakho ukulwethula kimi kusho lukhulu ngoba yisiko lethu okungamele sililahle, ukuveza isintu ngale ndlela iyonanto okumele siyikhuthalele. Ngizizwa ngithobeka nami ngiwuyise wabafana ababili ngelinye ilanga okumele ngibenzele lolu siko ngakho wuhlelo lolu olusenhliziyweni yami kakhulu," kuchaza yena.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ekhuluma nabezindaba ekomkhulu laleli qembu eWinnie Madikizela-Mandela House. Image: Itumeleng English/ Independent Newspapers UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ufuna iqembu lakhe linikezwe isikhundla soMphathiswa kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal. UMalema uthe noma kanjani bazosithola isikhundla asifunayo uma sekuchithwe uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo. I-EFF yeseka imizamo yeMKP yokuchitha uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe isifundazwe. Isiphakamiso seMKP sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, sachithwa ngonyaka odlule. UMalema uthe bazogcina bewuchithile uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal, wathi nabo bazoba yingxenye yokuphathwa kwesifundazwe uma sekuchithwe uhulumeni oholwa yi-IFP. "Sizoba nabaphathiswa KwaZulu-Natal kuhulumeni weMKP. Ungajahi, ijubane liyabulala. Siyasebenza lapha KwaZulu-Natal futhi kukhona okuzokwenzeka maduze. Uyazi ukuthi ngamahora amabili kuningi okungashintsha kwipolitiki." UMalema uthe bafuna ukuthi i-ANC ibambisane nabo neMKP. "Ilawa maqembu azophatha izwe ngomuso." UMalema uphinde wachaza kabanzi ngobudlelwano bakhe nabantu okuvela amagama abo kwikhomishini ephenya izinsolo ezenziwa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. UMalema uvumile ukuthi uyazana nosomabhizinisi uMnuz Ze Nxumalo nosomatekisi osashona owayesatshiswa okwenyoka, uMnuz Jotham "Mswazi" Msibi. Uvumile impela ukuthi wethula inkulumo emngcwabeni kaMsibi. Uthe waqala ukwazana noMsibi ngesikhathi kunesiteleka samatekisi. Uqhube wathi babexoxa ngezinto ezithinta amatekisi noMsibi. "Ngangiya kuyena ngiyomcela ukuthi behlise imali yokugibela ematekisini. Baningi abantu be-EFF abagibela amatekisi. Ayikho into ewubugebengu esasiyixoxa naye." UMalema uthe akukho okubi ngobudlelwano bakhe noNxumalo. "UZe ngazi ukuthi uyingane kaSolwazi Otty Nxumalo, owayengunobhala jikelele wokuqala we-IFP." UMalema uthe uNxumalo ungumngani wosomabhizinisi abaningi okubalwa kubo nabamhlophe. "UZe uwumngani wosomabhizinisi abaningi. Uyazi ukuthi uke avakashele ngisho emapulazini kaMnuz Johan Rupert? UZe ungumngani wendodakazi kaRupert. Kungani ningababuzi bona labo somabhizinisi ukuthi yini ebahlanganisa noNxumalo? Nibasabani abelungu?" UMalema uthe akukho okutheni ngobudlelwano bakhe nePhini likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa elimisiwe, uLiuetenant General Shadrack Sibiya. "Ngimazi ngokomsebenzi." Uthe akazibandakanyi nezenzo zobugebengu.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: I-logo entsha yokukhuthaza abantu bakuleli, ikakhulu intsha ukuthi ivote UNGENA kwelinye igiya umkhankaso wokukhuthaza intsha ukuthi ivote okhethweni oluzayo lohulumeni basekhaya. Ikhomishini yezokhetho isiqhamuke nezinye izindlela zokukhuthaza intsha ukuthi ivote ngokuvula i-podcast kanjalo nohlelo oluzodlala kwithelevishini, oluzokhuluma ngokhetho. Lokhu kuvele izolo ngesikhathi ikhomishini yethula i-logo ezosetshenziswa njengoba ukhetho kulindeleke ukuthi lube phakathi kukaNovemba nonyaka, noJanuwari ngonyaka ozayo. USihlalo wekhomishini uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, uthe bazokwethula i-podcast ngesonto elizayo lapho kuzobe kukhulunywa khona ngokhetho. "Le podcast izoqala ukusebenza ngo-Ephreli 8, kanti izobe ifundisa ngokuvota. Kuzoba nohlelo oluzodlala kwi-SABC 1, kusuka ngoMeyi 1, 2026, lokukhuthaza abantu abasha ukuthi babe yingxenye yokhetho," usho kanje ekhuluma eGoli. Uthe ngalezi zinhlelo, bahlose ukuqeda ngamampunge nangezinto ezingelona iqiniso ezithinta ukhetho. Isikhulu esiphezulu sekhomishini, uMnuz Sy Mamabolo, siveze ukuthi bahlela ukuqasha abasebenzi abevile ku-70 000, abazobe besebenza ngesikhathi kubhaliselwa ukuvota. "Bazobe bematasa ngesikhathi sempelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota ngoJuni 20 no-21. Sesenze wonke amalungiselelo athinta impelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota." UMoepya uthe i-logo ethuliwe ihlose ukugqugquzela intsha ukuthi ivote. "Inhloso yayo njengoba ithi, "Sukuma, ziveze bese uvota". Isho ukuthi intsha kanjalo nabantu bakuleli kumele babhukule, bavote. Abangabhalisile ukuvota basenalo ithuba lokwenza lokhu," usho kanje. Uthe akangabazi ukuthi ukhetho luzoba ngolukhululekile, nolunokuthula. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kusalindwe uNgqongqoshe wokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, ukuthi amemezele usuku lokhetho. Amandla akuyena ngosuku lokhetho ngenxa yokuthi olohulumeni basekhaya. Usuku lokhetho lukazwelonke lumenyezelwa ngumengameli wezwe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Umphathiswa wezeMfundo eKZN uSipho Hlomuka SITHOLE ukwesekwa isiphakamiso sikaNgqongqoshe weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, sokuthi kuphenywe impilo ephilwa yizikhulu nezisebenzi zoMnyango. UNksz Gwarube umeme uphiko oluphenya amacala enkohlakalo, i-Special Investigating Unit (SIU), ukuthi lwenze lolu phenyo eMnyangweni wakhe. Ukusho lokhu emva kokuba esolwe ngokuthi ufake unyawo lwedada wangenelela ohlelweni lokuqashwa kozokhulumela lo Mnyango kuzwelonke, kulandela ukuhamba kowayewukhulumela, uMnuz Elijah Mhlanga. Kuthiwa uNksz Gwarube kunomuntu ayemfuna angene esikhundleni, okuyinto ayichithayo. USihlalo wekomiti loMnyango weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha ePhalamende, uMnuz Mr Jan de Villiers, uthe uyaweseka umbono kaNksz Gwarube, wokuthi kuphenywe impilo yezisebenzi boMnyango. Uthe kumele kuhlakazwe isidleke senkohlakalo eMnyangweni, wathi kumele iSIU ilwenze lolu phenyo. "Sifuna uphenyo lugxile kwizisebenzi ezisezinhlakeni ezibalulekile. Yilapho okudlange khona inkohlakalo." Uthe bafuna kuphenywe nangokuqashwa kwezisebenzi eMnyangweni ngokufakwa kobhululu. "Izinsiza zikahulumeni kumele ziye kubafundi, nakulabo abazidingayo, hhayi emaphaketheni abathile. Abafundi yibona abathwala kanzima uma bengazitholi izimfanelo zabo." Uthe bazimisele ukusebenzisana neSIU ekuphenyeni impilo ephilwa abasebenzi eMnyangweni. "Sifuna uma sebebanjiwe abenza inkohlakalo, bavezwe obala. Sifuna bathathelwe nezinyathelo zokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. Sifuna baboshwe futhi labo abenza le nkohlakalo." Uthe bayayeseka yonke imizamo yokuqinisa ukusebenza kukahulumeni ngokulwa nenkohlakalo ukuze kuzuze abantu bakuleli. Inyunyana yothisha, iSadtu, ixwayise uNksz Gwarube ukuthi angasabisi izisebenzi ngokuthi ufuna iSIU iphenye impilo eziyiphilayo ekubeni zisebenza, zihola. Ixwayise ngokuthi ayeke ukufaka unyawo lwedada ohlelweni lokuqashwa kwezisebenzi nezikhulu eMnyangweni ngoba kunemithetho elandelwayo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI uSabelo Ngema ovivela ukugijima iComrades Marathon okokuqala ngoJuni UMCULI oyilungu leqembu i-Afrosoul ufuna ukugqugquzela ozakwabo ngokubaluleka kokuzivocavoca ukuze bagweme izifo. Uzokwenza lokhu ngokugijima iComrades Marathon okokuqala ngoJuni 14 nonyaka. USabelo Ngema uzoba ngomunye wezinkulungwane zabagijimi ezizosuka eThekwini, zilibangise eMgungundlovu, kulo mjaho ozoba ngoka-99 kulo nyaka. Lo mculi uzobe engaqali ukusebenzisa ukugijima ukuqwashisa abantu ngokubaluleka kokunakekela impilo njengoba ngonyaka odlule, yena nozakwabo bagijime besuka eThekwini baya ePort Edward, befundisa ngezifo zengqondo. “UNkulunkulu usidale ngendlela yokuthi akukho okungasihlula ukukwenza. Ngathi uma ngibona umkhulu omdala eqeda iComrades ngonyaka odlule, ngazitshela ukuthi nami ngifuna ukuzophonsela inselelo yokuthi ngiyiqede. Sengiwagijimile ama-marathon (42.2km), ngase ngithi ake ngizwe iComrades,” kusho uSabelo. Uthe ukugijima kuyamsiza empilweni nasemqondweni ngoba uyakhohlwa yizinkinga uma esemgwaqweni. “Uthi uma ugijima amabanga amade ubuye usuwakhe isitezi ngomqondo, usuthenge nezimoto. Ubuya namaqhinga amasha okuzithuthukisa, yingakho ngikuyamanisa kakhulu nezifo zengqondo ngoba ukhwantalala nengcindezi kuyaphela,” kusho yena. Uthe nasekhaya isimo siba ngcono uma ujima ngoba ukhwantalala nengcindezi, kusuke kuphansi. “Kuthina esiganelwe, ekhaya kumnandi. Umama uhlala ehleka futhi upheka kahle. Uma uyindoda uhlala ujabule, ungakhathazeki nangokuhamba imitholampilo yamadoda ngoba uba wuqanduqandu. Lokho ngezinye zezinto ezinhle ezenziwa ukujima ngoba umndeni uyabumbana,” kusho uSabelo oshadelwe wuzakwabo acula naye eqenjini, uThandeka Zulu. Uthe ugqugquzelwa kakhulu umculi we-kwaito ophinde abe wumfundisi, uKabelo Mabalane, osegijime iComrades izikhawu eziningi. Uqhube wathi baningi abanye njengoDJ Sndara, naye oseke wayigijima iComrades Marathon phambili. “Ngiyabasifela abafowethu esinabo emkhakheni wezokungcebeleka ukuthi bakujwayele ukuzivocavoca futhi behlise nasezinkanjini zikaFaro. Ngiyazi ukuthi ngizozwakala njengomuntu ozenza ngcono kodwa asisebenzise uphuzo njengento yenjabulo ngaleso sikhathi, hhayi ukuthi silusebenzise ngokweqile ngoba luzohlukumeza imizimba yethu. Asijimeni. Buka ubaba uHhashi Elimhlophe ukuthi uma esesteji, udlula izintwana ezincane.” Uthe ngokujima yena usehlale enomfutho singabi khona nesidingo sokusebenzisa izikhuthazi nokusiza impilo yakhe. “Ngiyakhumbula eminyakeni edlule uL’vovo ngesikhathi ewa esteji, ngaba ngomunye wabokuqala engaya ukuyomsiza. Ngiyambona manje ukuthi uyajima, okuyinto engikhuthazayo nami nengifisa ngathi bakhona nabanye abangafunda kuyo.” Uphethe ngokuveza ukuthi uzoqala amaqoqo okugijima ngalapho ehlala khona, eReservoir Hills ngenhloso yokukhuthaza nabanye.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Constable Emmanuel Shimmy Ntoampe UConstable Bheki Gavin Sithole, Adedelwe ngebheyili amaphoyisa amathathu asebenzela uphiko lwe-Gauteng se-Crime Intelligence, aboshwe ngezithuba zabo-16:20 ngeSonto kuRakoma Street, eTokoza. La maphoyisa okunguConstable Emmanuel Shimmy Ntoampe, uConstable Bheki Gavin Sithole, uConstable Tshabangu anikezwe ibheyili ka-R1500 umuntu ngamunye. Umsolwa wesine okuthiwa uyimpimpi yamaphoyisa ugcinwe esitokisini. Laba babhekene necala lokugebenga ibhizinisi eliphethwe ngabasePakistan eliseduze neLetsoho Shopping Centre. Kuthiwa bagasele esitolo bazethula njengamaphoyisa bafuna ugwayi ongekho emthethweni. Kuthiwa baphinde babopha ummangali nabasebenzi bakhe ngozankosi ngaphambi kokuthi balayishe amabhokisi kagwayi ongekho emthethweni ezimotweni zabo. Umnikazi webhizinisi odabuka ePakistani ubikele i-Thathazonke Anti-Crime Community Group, yaphendula ngokushesha abasolwa baboshwa. La malungu akhonjwe umkhuzi wawo njengabasebenzi besifundazwe beCrime Intelligence. Uphenyo lokuqala luphinde lwaholela ekuthathweni kwalobu bufakazi obutholwe kubasolwa: •Amabhokisi amahlanu kagwayi ongekho emthethweni •Izibhamu zokudlala ezine •Izibhamu zikahulumeni ezimbili  futhi kuthathwe ne-video eqoshwe endaweni yesehlo. Icala lizobuyela eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePalm Ridge ngomhla ka-17 Ephreli 2026.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNkk Thuli Khumalo USHAYA amakhala umndeni wowesifazane okuthiwa ugwazwe wabulawa ngesihluku kanye nendodana yakhe eNgwelezane, eMpangeni. Kulesi sigameko esenzeke ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uNkk Thuli Khumalo (56) nengane yakhe yomfana uMbuso Khumalo (13). Kuthiwa izidumbu zabo zitholwe ekhaya, zinamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Ngokusho kwesihlobo esicele ukungadalulwa, umndeni kawuyizwa kahle eyokubulawa kwabo “yisigebengu”. Sitshele Isolezwe ukuthi esinye isihlobo esisondelene nomufi, sitshele umndeni ukuthi isigameko senzeke sikhona naso ekhaya. Kuthiwa sithe sona besicashile ngesikhathi isigebengu sigwaza sibulala owesifazane nendodana yakhe. “Okudidayo wukuthi esitatimendeni asibhalise emaphoyiseni, uguqukile kulokhu akusho emndenini, wathi ufike isigameko sesenzekile kodwa umbonile umsolwa kancane,” kusho isihlobo. Elanda ngalokhu okuthiwa isihlobo sikutshele amaphoyisa, umthombo uthe siwatshele ukuthi sifike ekhaya sibuya emsebenzini, saqaphela ukuthi akukhanyisiwe endlini kodwa kuvuliwe. “Uveze ukuthi uthe esengaphakathi wabona isithunzi sithi shazi, wazitshela ukuthi uMbuso. Uthe uhambe wayokhanyisa ngasekhishini, lapho abone khona ukuthi akuyena uMbuso kodwa isigebengu esiphethe ijazi lakhe ne-laptop, maqede, saphuma sabaleka,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi isihlobo sitshele amaphoyisa ukuthi siphumile sasijaha isigebengu, esivele seqa uthango, sawa, sashiya phansi i-laptop nejazi. “Uthe ngesikhathi esebuyela endlini, ilapho abone khona ukuthi uMbuso ulimele, wase etshela omakhelwane,” kusho umthombo. Umthombo uthe ngesikhathi kufika umndeni nomakhelwane endaweni yesigameko, lesi sihlobo besingakayikhulumi ekalona wesifazane. “Kubuze umndeni ukuthi uphi uThuli, kwayima kuqala ecingwa. Yiso sihlobo esijike samthola kuqala phansi kombhede, naye egwaziwe,” umthombo usho kanje. Uthe awekho amaconsi egazi abeconse aze ayofika ngaphansi kombhede. Uthe basola sona isihlobo lesi ngokufa kwalaba ababili ngenxa yokushintshashintsha inkulumo uma sichaza okwenzekile. Umthombo uveze ukuthi basola ukuthi lesi sihlobo sifike sagwaza lona wesifazane, sase sifihla isidumbu sakhe ngaphansi kombhede. “Sisola ukuthi uMbuso yena ubulawelwe ukuthi ubone okuthile, naye wasale esebulawa,” sisho kanje. Umthombo uqhube wathi okunye okwenza bashaye amakhala ukuthi bathole ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule, ukuthi lona wesifazane ubehlukunyezwa kuleli khaya. “Yena uMbuso uke wagijima waya emzini wesinye isihlobo, eyocela ukuthi sizolamulela unina ngoba uyashawa. Nebala waficwa eshaywa ngempela,” kusho umthombo. Uthe yena futhi uMbuso ubethi uma edlala nezinye izingane, akhiphe amazwi athi ziyajabula zona ngoba abazo omama abashaywa muntu. “Siwatshelile amaphoyisa konke lokhu nokuthi sifuna uphenyo lwawo luqale khona egcekeni ngoba aseneme ngezitatimende ezingafani,” kusho umthombo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal uLt Col Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngoLwesine. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka," kusho uMagwaza. Uthe akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, neNkosi Mabhudu Israel Tembe, eMkhosini woMthayi INKOSI Mabhudu Israel Tembe inesifiso sokuthi uMkhosi woMthayi udlondlobale uze ufike ezingeni lemicimbi emikhulu ehlonishaywo efana neVodacom Durban July kanye nomcimbi womculo i-Cape Town International Jazz Festival. Inkosi ithe nakuba umkhosi uhlukile ukuneDurban July kanye nomcimbi wejazz, iyafisa ukuthi umkhosi nawo ubalwa kanye nale micimbi uma kukhulunywa ngemicimbi ethuthukisa umnotho. Ikusho lokhu ngesikhathi ixoxa neSolezwe. UMkhosi woMthayi ugujwa minyaka yonke lapho khona abesifazane besuke belethe imikhiqizo eyakhiwe ngamaganu okubalwa kuyo notshwala obuvutshelwe ngamaganu. Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi umkhosi uthuthukise umnotho wendawo. "Nakuba umkhosi ungafani neDurban July, kodwa iDurban July uma ifikile eThekwini isho ukuthi izoshiya cishe u-R1 billion emnothweni ngesonto nje elilodwa. Ijazz eCape Town nayo yenza into efanayo. Siyafisa ke ukuthi nalapha emakhaya kube khona umnotho osalayo ozokwenza ukuthi abantu abaqashisa ngezindawo zokulala bakwazi ukuziphilisa kuze kube kuphinde kufika esikhathi lapho kwanda abantu abaqasha izindawo zokulala." Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi kube nemibukiso ezokuba khona uma kunomkhosi. "Sifuna ukuba nombukiso lapho sizobambisana noMnyango wezoLimo. Sifuna ukubona ukuthi abantu bengasizakala kwelimo. Inkampani yezimoto enkulu yezimoto, iToyota, nayo izokwenza  umbukiso. Izimoto zabo zithengwa kakhulu endaweni. Banesibopho sokubuyisela emphakathini. Sizobheka ukuthi yini abangayenzela umphakathi." Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi baphinde balekelele abantu abadayisa imikhiqizo ukuthi bakwazi ukudayisela amazwe angaphandle. Inkosi ithe ifuna nokuthi baqinise nasemnothweni wasolwandle ikakhulukazi ukudoba. "Kusenomnotho ongathintiwe lapha kwezokuvakasha, umnotho wasolwandle. Lento isakhulunywa nje, isebenzela kakhulu iWestern Cape lapho kudotshwa kakhulu ofishi. Lo mnotho unamandla kakhulu. Nathi siyafisa ukusondeza ochwepheshe." Inkosi inamava kwezokuvakasha kanye nezokuthuthukiswa komnotho njengoba isike yaba usihlalo wamabhodi ezinhlangano zezokuvakasha. Inkosi ike yaba usihlalo webhodi leSimangaliso Wetland Park, ike yaba iphini likasihlalo webhodi, futhi ike yaba ilungu lebhodi lezeMvelo KZN Wildlife.
